notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

publicLinks.intro: Quick links to the public pages you can share with players and viewers.

playerSearch.title: Public Player Search
playerSearch.description: Search for registered players by name, Steam ID or profile URL.

playerProfile.title: Player Profile (public)
playerProfile.description: Direct link to a player profile by Steam ID64. Players who are signed in with Steam can also use the "My profile" link in the top bar instead of copying URLs.

teamMatch.title: Team Match Page (public)
teamMatch.description: Read-only view of a team's current or most recent match.

tournamentLeaderboard.title: Tournament Leaderboard (public)
tournamentLeaderboard.description: Public standings page for the current tournament (defaults to tournament 1).
